memories: The user is planning their 30th birthday party.
The user wants the party's theme to be based on their favorite artist's most iconic music video.
The user's favorite color is pink.
The user has specified that the 'most iconic music video' in their opinion is '...Baby One More Time'.
User listens to historical fiction audiobooks while commuting on the subway.
The user works as a graphic designer.
The user's favorite musical artist is Britney Spears.
query: Can you give me some ideas for decorations and activities for my party?
